prompt: Transform the pie chart into a vibrant mosaic with stained glass texture, adding subtle golden outlines for elegance.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1: Transform the existing pie chart into a vibrant mosaic with a distinct stained glass texture. Each segment of the pie chart, including the separated red segment, should be rendered as a unique stained glass piece, preserving its original color and shape. Incorporate subtle golden outlines around all the mosaic segments to add an elegant finish.
objects: Red pie chart segment with stained glass texture (separated)
Blue pie chart segment with stained glass texture
Orange pie chart segment with stained glass texture
Yellow pie chart segment with stained glass texture
Green pie chart segment with stained glass texture
Golden outlines around all mosaic segments
